name: @tjakoen/mill
description: MILL — Markdown In, Living Layouts: a Markdown → GRAIN-pages CMS.
author: Tjakoen Stolk <tjakoen.s@gmail.com> (https://tjakoen.github.io)

scripts.deps:refresh: for p in batch grain; do bun add @tjakoen/$p@github:tjakoen/$p#$(git ls-remote https://github.com/tjakoen/$p.git main | cut -c1-7); done
